# registry_organization_member (Resource)

Manages a user's membership in a registry organization. Import using '<organization_id>/<user_id>'.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "registry_organization_member" "example" {
  organization_id  = registry_organization.example.id
  user_id          = registry_user.example.id
  role_template_id = data.registry_role_templates.all.role_templates[0].id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_id` (String) UUID of the organization.
- `user_id` (String) UUID of the user.

### Optional

- `role_template_id` (String) UUID of the role template to assign to this member.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp when the membership was created.
- `id` (String) Composite ID in the format '<organization_id>/<user_id>'.
- `role_template_display_name` (String) Display name of the assigned role template.
- `role_template_name` (String) Name of the assigned role template.
- `user_email` (String) Email of the member user.
- `user_name` (String) Name of the member user.
